scope: Add a repo-local readout and markdown export path for saved MiroFish frontier hybrid runs and use it on the deeper 90-domain checkpoint

decision_context.prior_state: The deeper frontier tranche was saved as a raw hybrid run and diagnostic, but there was no compact ranked surface equivalent to the portfolio readout/export workflow.
decision_context.decision: Add frontier readout and export helpers in the MiroFish CLI, then generate the actual readout and markdown export from the deeper 90-domain frontier checkpoint.
decision_context.why_now: This makes the current frontier checkpoint reviewable and gives the next scaling step a clean operator surface instead of relying on raw run packets.

files_expected.purpose: Adds frontier readout and markdown export helpers.
Exposes frontier readout and export commands.
Covers the frontier readout and markdown export helpers.
Saved ranked frontier readout from the deeper checkpoint.
Operator-facing markdown export for the deeper frontier readout.
Documents the current winners and why the export exists.

planned_steps: Add readout and export helpers for saved frontier hybrid runs
Expose the new helpers through the repo-local CLI
Generate the actual readout and markdown export from the deeper frontier tranche

commands: $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m pytest tests/test_mirofish_hybrid.py tests/test_mirofish_discovery.py tests/test_mirofish_portfolio.py tests/test_trend_prediction.py -q

$env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m chip_labs.cli mirofish-frontier-export --input research/meta/MIROFISH_FRONTIER_READOUT_TRANCHE_90_DEEPER_2026-03-24.json --output research/meta/MIROFISH_FRONTIER_EXPORT_TRANCHE_90_DEEPER_2026-03-24.md --title "MiroFish Frontier Tranche 90 Deeper Export"
expected_checks: The readout packet ranks frontier domains by retained ensemble adoption with benchmark context
The markdown export renders top overall, choice leaders, watchlist, and above-benchmark sections
The current deeper frontier checkpoint is reviewable without reopening the raw run packet

guardrails: Do not invent a second evaluation model beyond the saved frontier run metrics
Do not treat the 90-domain frontier export as equivalent to a full 1000-domain frontier simulation
Keep the frontier export downstream of the saved run packet
